hero.title: Boas-Vindas ao Fossify!
hero.subtitle: ⚠️ O site ainda está em contrução. Por favor volte depois.

about.description: A group of simple, open source apps without ads and unnecessary permissions, with customizable colors. A fork of @SimpleMobileTools.

vision.title: Nossa visão:
vision.text: Imagine a world where mobile apps enhance our lives without invading our privacy. That's what Fossify strives for. We envision a thriving community of people working together to create free, open-source apps that benefit everyone. Join us and build a more secure, user-friendly digital future, one app at a time.

mission.title: Nossa missão:
mission.text: Building privacy-first mobile apps for everyone. Fossify revives the legacy of @SimpleMobileTools, crafting open-source tools that are ad-free and easy to use. We empower individuals and communities with technology that respects their privacy and keeps things simple.

donation.title: Ajude o Fossify ❤️
donation.description: Se você gostaria de ajudar no desenvolvimento do Fossify, considere fazer uma doação usando qualquer uma das opções abaixo.

products.title: Our products
products.description: Fossify apps are a community-backed, open-source, and ad-free suite of mobile apps. A fork of the @SimpleMobileTools, which is no longer maintained, and we're here to continue the legacy, bringing simple and private tech to everyone.
